title: Fair practices code and consumer protection for Personal Loan
content: [SYNTHETIC POLICY FOR DEMO PURPOSES ONLY] NexBank's customer protection policy for Personal Loan is aligned with the RBI Charter of Customer Rights. We guarantee the Right to Fair Treatment, Right to Transparency, Right to Suitability, and Right to Grievance Redressal. Customers are protected against coercive collections and unauthorized disclosure of personal data. All terms, fee changes, and interest rates are clearly disclosed. Annual compliance audits are published to maintain transparency with regulatory bodies and our account holders.
